title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Amrapali Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Amrapali Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Amrapali Group has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amrapali Group:
Amrapali Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amrapali Group!
